name: italian sausage
basis: raw sausage from ground pork (FSIS 160 F)

name: beef steak
basis: beef whole cut (FSIS 145 F + 3 min rest)

name: beef chuck roast
basis: beef whole cut/roast (FSIS 145 F + 3 min rest)

name: pork chop
basis: pork whole cut (FSIS 145 F + 3 min rest)

name: pork tenderloin
basis: pork whole cut (FSIS 145 F + 3 min rest)

name: pork shoulder
basis: pork whole cut/roast (FSIS 145 F + 3 min rest)

name: lamb
basis: lamb whole cut (FSIS 145 F + 3 min rest)

name: anchovy
basis: finfish (FSIS 145 F); note: usually salt-cured but classed as fish for the cook-temp rule

name: scallop
basis: mollusc (cook until opaque; FSIS 145 F applied)

name: mussel
basis: mollusc (cook until shells open; FSIS 145 F applied)

name: clam
basis: mollusc (cook until shells open; FSIS 145 F applied)

name: egg
basis: shell egg / egg dish (FSIS 160 F; raw preparations hard-block in v0)

name: canned tuna
basis: pre-cooked and shelf-stable; no cook-temp rule

name: ham
basis: cured / commercially fully-cooked pork (retail form assumed); fresh green ham would be whole_cut but is off-universe

name: bacon
basis: cured pork; typically fried to crisp; no internal-temp target applied in v0

name: tofu
basis: plant protein; no C. botulinum cook-temp rule
